abilities.name: Sonic Resonance
abilities.narrationHints: Focused sound waves that can shake, shatter, resonate with, or gently move physical objects. Visible as shimmering pressure ripples in the air.
abilities.description: Project focused resonant waves to move, shake, or shatter matter at a distance.

abilities.name: Echo Sense
abilities.narrationHints: Sound-based perception like echolocation — hearing shapes, movement, and hollow spaces through walls and darkness.
abilities.description: Perceive your surroundings through sound reflection — even through walls, smoke, or darkness.

abilities.name: Resonant Shield
abilities.narrationHints: A standing-wave barrier of interference patterns that deflects projectiles and dampens incoming force.
abilities.description: Raise a standing-wave barrier that dampens incoming force.

abilities.name: Harmonic Voice
abilities.narrationHints: Layered vocal overtones that soothe fear, ease tension, and lend weight to spoken words. Subtle — listeners feel it more than hear it.
abilities.description: Weave calming overtones into your speech, easing fear and hostility in those who hear you.
